summary: Honest front‑of‑house capture of a flat‑mid Miami arena, highlighted by a wacky Dark Star and a standout second set.
review: Both reviewers give the recording five stars, praising its unvarnished FOB sound despite the arena’s less than ideal acoustics – mids are a bit flat but it translates well on good speakers. The show shines in the second half, with the “wacko Dark Star” singled out as a memorable moment.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high ratings (5 stars) and enthusiastic comments indicate an excellent performance with a solid, if not pristine, audience recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Front‑of‑house capture; arena sound flat in the mids, but clear enough to convey the live experience on a good system.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set is highlighted as the high point of the concert, delivering the memorable Dark Star and overall strong performance.
